steps.title: Set the weight limit
steps.content:
Let $n$ be the number of crates. The trailer weighs $600$ pounds, and each crate weighs $130$ pounds, so:
$$600+130n\le 5{,}180$$

steps.title: Solve for crates
steps.content:
Subtract the trailer weight, then divide by the crate weight:
$$130n\le 4{,}580$$
$$n\le \frac{4{,}580}{130}$$
$$n\le 35.23$$

steps.title: Use a whole number
steps.content: The crate count must be a whole number. The maximum whole number that does not exceed $35.23$ is $35$. The answer is A.
